title: [supervisor] Build PR-repair supervisor loop with runner-capacity gates
objective: Build: Implement the supervisor loop that scans FlexNetOS PRs, classifies failures, reruns stale checks once, creates or updates repair lanes, assigns one worker per lane, watches CI, enforces runner-capacity limits, and merges/automerge green PRs.
acceptance_criteria: Supervisor start preflight runs `rtk meta project list --json`, `rtk meta git status`, and `rtk meta git worktree list --json`.

Classification distinguishes stale_queued, runner_infra, merge_conflict, pr_test_regression, platform_specific, cross_pr_shared_failure, policy_or_metadata_failure, superseded, and flaky with evidence.
Active CI-producing repair lanes are capped to current runner capacity, initially 2, unless live runner evidence supports a different cap.
The loop never mutates outside an assigned lane unless a supervisor reclassifies work as a shared incident.
Green PR merge/automerge requires required checks green, clean scope, no blocking review, and no supersession evidence.
test_commands: gh pr list --repo FlexNetOS/flexnetos_runner --state open --json number,title,statusCheckRollup
